description: The first agent-native Meta Ads CLI with local SQLite history and compound queries the live API cannot answer.

novel_features.name: Creative-Fatigue Observatory
novel_features.description: Detect ads whose CPM is drifting up, frequency is climbing, and CTR is falling across a configurable window.

novel_features.name: Creative Decay Curve
novel_features.description: Compare a creative's first-impression CTR against its current CTR, with projected dead-date.

novel_features.name: Audience Overlap Cartographer
novel_features.description: Pairwise overlap percentages across custom audiences, with cannibalization recommendations.

novel_features.name: Learning-Phase Forensics
novel_features.description: Surface adsets stuck in algorithmic learning >N days with root-cause hint (budget too low, audience too narrow, events too sparse).

novel_features.name: Spend Reconciliation
novel_features.description: Per-day diff between Meta-reported account spend and sum-of-insights spend; flags days where attribution drift exceeds threshold.

novel_features.name: Bottleneck Surfacer
novel_features.description: Highest-spend adsets with worst ROAS, ranked with 'why' column joining learning state and effective status.

novel_features.name: Stale Active Ads
novel_features.description: Active ads with zero impressions in N days.

novel_features.name: Account Inventory Roll-up
novel_features.description: Group every ad in an account by effective_status, surface ads where configured status='ACTIVE' but effective_status='WITH_ISSUES' or 'DISAPPROVED'.
